name: engineering-assembly
description: Directory of popular Claude Code extensions including development and productivity tools.

plugins.name: implementation
plugins.description: A structured validation workflow for software development tasks, plus QA test automation and JIRA integration. Validates requirement completeness, runs manual test cases on web (playwright-cli) or Android (adb) via the automation-expert agent, and retrieves/posts results to JIRA tickets.

plugins.name: worktree-setup
plugins.description: Packages a WorktreeCreate hook so `claude --worktree <name>` creates a branch, places the worktree under .worktrees/<name>, and initializes submodules — no per-repo setup.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Bundles the Context7 MCP server (https://mcp.context7.com/mcp) so Claude Code can pull up-to-date, version-specific library documentation and code examples on demand.

plugins.name: atlassian-sso
plugins.description: Bundles the Atlassian Remote MCP Server (Rovo) so Claude Code can access Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Bitbucket, and Compass via OAuth 2.1 SSO login.

plugins.name: atlassian-api-token
plugins.description: Bundles the Atlassian Remote MCP Server (Rovo) so Claude Code can access Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Bitbucket, and Compass using a personal API token (Basic auth) instead of interactive SSO login.

plugins.name: session-context
plugins.description: Persistent project memory across Claude Code sessions: append-only diary (LOG) and decision (DEC) logs under .claude/memory, with cheap sliced reads for clock-in and structured writes for clock-out.
